summary: Verified both P0 Kids-bug fixes via Playwright on the live preview URL. BUG 1 FIX confirmed: clicking a kids poster navigates to /title/movie/<id> (NOT /kids/exit-pin) and __vesperKidsLocked clears to ''. Back from Detail returns to KidsHome with locked='1'. BUG 2 FIX confirmed: plain / (no ?profile=kids) yields __vesperBootProfileKids=false and KidsHome is NOT rendered. Regression checks pass: /api/auth/login (testuser/testpass123) returns a JWT, /api/streams/movie/tt0111161 returns streams, and ?profile=kids with no PIN routes to /kids/setup.
critical_code_review_comments: useKidsBackGuard's popstate handler always navigates to /kids/exit-pin when ANY popstate fires while on a topmost kids path. In-app pushState+popstate to /search from KidsHome therefore bounces to exit-pin. This is intended kiosk behavior for hardware BACK at root, but be aware it also triggers for any synthetic popstate. Not a bug for the user's actual flow (poster click is a navigate(), not a popstate).
App.js is 909 lines — consider extracting the module-load IIFE (lines 156-401) into a separate boot-guard module for maintainability.

isKidsAllowedPath includes '/search' as allowed-aux, but the back-guard's onPop will still bounce away from it if it's reached via a back action. The interaction between useKidsBackGuard and useKidsKioskGuard is subtle — recommend a doc-comment block explaining the split (topmost vs deep) is the only contract guarantee.
test_credentials: testuser / testpass123 (Vesper login); Kids PIN 1234 seeded via localStorage onnowtv-kids-config-v1
seed_data_creation: Playwright pre-seeded localStorage with kids PIN=1234 and onnowtv-active-profile-v1=kids before navigating with ?profile=kids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 validated both P0 fixes for ON NOW TV V2 Kids/Vesper APKs. The JS flag window.__vesperKidsLocked is the source of truth for the native Android onKeyDown BACK handler — set to '1' on topmost kids paths (/, /kids, /kids/exit-pin) and '' on deep paths (/title/*, /play, /search, /resolve/*). Vesper host (tv.onnowtv.app) hard-guards against kids context regardless of stale localStorage. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter56_regression.py covers auth + streams.
rca of the issue: Original bug: useKidsBackGuard set window.__vesperKidsLocked='1' unconditionally whenever kids was active with PIN. The Kids APK's native MainActivity.onKeyDown BACK handler reads this flag and bounces to /kids/exit-pin when locked. Result: clicking a movie poster → Detail loaded → user pressed BACK → bounced to exit-pin instead of returning to KidsHome. Fix: both useKidsBackGuard and useKidsKioskGuard now set the flag only on TOPMOST kids paths (isTopmostKidsPath checks /, /kids, /kids/exit-pin) and explicitly clear it to '' on deep paths so the native BACK handler does a normal webView.goBack(). Verified: locked='1' on KidsHome, locked='' on /title/movie/tt29355505, and back-from-detail correctly returns to KidsHome (not exit-pin). Separately, Vesper hard-guard in App.js module-load IIFE forces __vesperBootProfileKids=false when hostPackage==='tv.onnowtv.app', strips ?profile=kids from URL, and nukes persisted kids config to prevent the Kids UI from rendering inside the Movies/TV APK.
